name: Surreal Dream Sequence
description: Abstract, heavily stylized dream — stylization and artistic flexibility matter most.

shot.description: A figure floats above a shattered mirror landscape. Colors shift between deep purple and gold. Time feels distorted.
shot.prompt: Surreal dreamscape, floating figure above broken mirrors, shifting purple and gold palette, ethereal atmosphere, abstract cinematic, painterly style

notes: Should favor providers with strong stylization support. Photorealism not needed.
